product_results.title: ONES Magnetic for iPhone 16 Pro Case, [Compatible with MagSafe] [Military-Grade Drop Protection] Carbon Fiber Pattern, Shockproof Protective Hard Back Slim Cover for iPhone 16 Pro, Black

summary.text: Customers find the cellular phone case fits perfectly and consider it good enough. The case looks good in appearance. Users are satisfied with the material quality. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding wireless charging capabilities, protection levels, and magnetic strength performance.

authors_reviews.title: Phone case review
authors_reviews.text: I bought this carbon fibre phone case matches my carbon fibre tape I have boughten from Amazon it has a great design on it and I also enjoy the carbon fibre. Great product.
authors_reviews.author: Delano Luciano

authors_reviews.title: Perfect with 1 slight problem.
authors_reviews.text: Excellent product with 1 flaw.Pros:It fits my s24 perfectly. Does a great job of popping in with no issues- Looks very nice! There is a sort of carbon fiber looking back to it that looks and feels nice (has not scratched after one week so far)- The magnet is very strong and works perfectly (No damage so far) - It will allow you to connect to most magsafe chargers - I added a wallet to the back of my phone and it has 0 issues / never falls offCons:- The case has a sort of grate where the phone speaker is - The s24 speaker is actually an open slit so when you play music or anything over a medium level it gets a fuzzy sound as the sound tries to pass through the grate (I'm pretty sure this is what it is attributed to. When I remove the case, everything sounds fine).Overall - excellent product with one flaw.
authors_reviews.author: Fabrizio Oliver

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Slim Yet Protective Case
authors_reviews.text: This case is precisely what I was looking for: slim, lightweight, and stylish, but still offers real protection. It adds almost no bulk to my iPhone 13 Pro, so it slips easily into my pocket or bag. Yet, it feels sturdy and secure in my hand thanks to the non-slip grip.The MagSafe compatibility is flawless, magnets are strong and hold accessories firmly, and wireless charging works perfectly without needing to remove the case. The carbon fibre texture not only looks sleek but also resists fingerprints and smudges exceptionally well, which is a significant advantage over the clear cases I’ve used before.I also appreciate the thoughtful protection details: the raised edges keep the camera and screen safe, and the soft microfiber lining means no scratches on the phone itself. It really feels like they balanced durability and elegance perfectly.Overall, I couldn’t be happier. This case gives me peace of mind without sacrificing style or comfort. A must-have if you want slim protection that actually works
authors_reviews.author: Taha

authors_reviews.title: i would give it a 4 star
authors_reviews.author: Hardenth50

authors_reviews.title: No front screen protection
authors_reviews.text: The front lip is not raised, so no screen protection on this case at all. It sat nearly flush on my phone.Other than that, the case was nice.
authors_reviews.author: Jason Davis

authors_reviews.title: Doesn’t charge with case
authors_reviews.text: I like the feel and fit of this case. Unfortunately it does not wirelessly charge. Not sure if it’s the MagSafe magnet that is stopping this from working. I had to take the case off to charge my phone. Had to return this.
authors_reviews.author: andrew dirks
